functions.name: MetricBar
params:
{
  compact = false,
  hint,
  label,
  tone = "green",
  value,
}

functions.name: BlurFade
params:
{
  children,
  className,
  variant,
  duration = 0.4,
  delay = 0,
  offset = 6,
  direction = "down",
  inView = false,
  inViewMargin = "-50px",
  blur = "6px",
  ...props
}

functions.name: BorderBeam
params:
{
  className,
  size = 50,
  delay = 0,
  duration = 6,
  colorFrom = "#ffaa40",
  colorTo = "#9c40ff",
  transition,
  style,
  reverse = false,
  initialOffset = 0,
  borderWidth = 1,
}

functions.name: GridPattern
params:
{
  width = 40,
  height = 40,
  x = -1,
  y = -1,
  strokeDasharray = "0",
  squares,
  className,
  ...props
}

functions.name: NumberTicker
params:
{
  value,
  startValue = 0,
  direction = "up",
  delay = 0,
  className,
  decimalPlaces = 0,
  ...props
}
